mapper.insert:
/* 요금 등록 */ INSERT INTO tb_bill ( site_id, bill_yearm, meter_read_day, plan_type, plan_name, contract_power, svc_sdate, svc_edate, base_rate, consume_rate, off_peak_rate, mid_peak_rate, max_peak_rate, pwr_factor_rate, tot_elec_rate, elec_fund, val_add_tax, tot_amt_bill, peak_pwr_demand, usg, off_peak_usg, mid_peak_usg, max_peak_usg, lead_pwr_factor, lag_pwr_factor, ess_chg_incen, ess_dischg_incen, demand_chg_reduct, energy_chg_reduct, ess_chg_off_peak, ess_chg_mid_peak, ess_chg_max_peak, ess_dischg_off_peak, ess_dischg_mid_peak, ess_dischg_max_peak, bdayIn_month, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{entity.siteId}, #{entity.billYearm}, #{entity.meterReadDay}, #{entity.planType}, #{entity.planName}, #{entity.contractPower}, #{entity.svcSdate}, #{entity.svcEdate}, #{entity.baseRate}, #{entity.consumeRate}, #{entity.offPeakRate}, #{entity.midPeakRate}, #{entity.maxPeakRate}, #{entity.pwrFactorRate}, #{entity.totElecRate}, #{entity.elecFund}, #{entity.valAddTax}, #{entity.totAmtBill}, #{entity.peakPwrDemand}, #{entity.usg}, #{entity.offPeakUsg}, #{entity.midPeakUsg}, #{entity.maxPeakUsg}, #{entity.leadPwrFactor}, #{entity.lagPwrFactor}, #{entity.essChgIncen}, #{entity.essDischgIncen}, #{entity.demandChgReduct}, #{entity.energyChgReduct}, #{entity.essChgOffPeak}, #{entity.essChgMidPeak}, #{entity.essChgMaxPeak}, #{entity.essDischgOffPeak}, #{entity.essDischgMidPeak}, #{entity.essDischgMaxPeak}, #{entity.bdayInMonth}, now())
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.update:
/* 요금 수정 */ UPDATE tb_bill
site_id = #{entity.siteId},
bill_yearm = #{entity.billYearm},
meter_read_day = #{entity.meterReadDay},
plan_type = #{entity.planType},
plan_name = #{entity.planName},
contract_power = #{entity.contractPower},
svc_sdate = #{entity.svcSdate},
svc_edate = #{entity.svcEdate},
base_rate = #{entity.baseRate},
consume_rate = #{entity.consumeRate},
off_peak_rate = #{entity.offPeakRate},
mid_peak_rate = #{entity.midPeakRate},
max_peak_rate = #{entity.maxPeakRate},
pwr_factor_rate = #{entity.pwrFactorRate},
tot_elec_rate = #{entity.totElecRate},
elec_fund = #{entity.elecFund},
val_add_tax = #{entity.valAddTax},
tot_amt_bill = #{entity.totAmtBill},
peak_pwr_demand = #{entity.peakPwrDemand},
usg = #{entity.usg},
off_peak_usg = #{entity.offPeakUsg},
mid_peak_usg = #{entity.midPeakUsg},
max_peak_usg = #{entity.maxPeakUsg},
lead_pwr_factor = #{entity.leadPwrFactor},
lag_pwr_factor = #{entity.lagPwrFactor},
ess_chg_incen = #{entity.essChgIncen},
ess_dischg_incen = #{entity.essDischgIncen},
demand_chg_reduct = #{entity.demandChgReduct},
energy_chg_reduct = #{entity.energyChgReduct},
ess_chg_off_peak = #{entity.essChgOffPeak},
ess_chg_mid_peak = #{entity.essChgMidPeak},
ess_chg_max_peak = #{entity.essChgMaxPeak},
ess_dischg_off_peak = #{entity.essDischgOffPeak},
ess_dischg_mid_peak = #{entity.essDischgMidPeak},
ess_dischg_max_peak = #{entity.essDischgMaxPeak},
bdayIn_month = #{entity.bdayInMonth},
reg_date = #{entity.regDate},
mod_date = now(),
WHERE bill_idx = #{entity.billIdx}
mapper.select: /* 요금 상세조회 */ SELECT bill_idx, site_id, bill_yearm, meter_read_day, plan_type, plan_name, contract_power, svc_sdate, svc_edate, base_rate, consume_rate, off_peak_rate, mid_peak_rate, max_peak_rate, pwr_factor_rate, tot_elec_rate, elec_fund, val_add_tax, tot_amt_bill, peak_pwr_demand, usg, off_peak_usg, mid_peak_usg, max_peak_usg, lead_pwr_factor, lag_pwr_factor, ess_chg_incen, ess_dischg_incen, demand_chg_reduct, energy_chg_reduct, ess_chg_off_peak, ess_chg_mid_peak, ess_chg_max_peak, ess_dischg_off_peak, ess_dischg_mid_peak, ess_dischg_max_peak, bdayIn_month, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_bill WHERE bill_idx = #{billIdx}

/* 요금 상세조회 */ SELECT bill_idx, site_id, bill_yearm, meter_read_day, plan_type, plan_name, contract_power, svc_sdate, svc_edate, base_rate, consume_rate, off_peak_rate, mid_peak_rate, max_peak_rate, pwr_factor_rate, tot_elec_rate, elec_fund, val_add_tax, tot_amt_bill, peak_pwr_demand, usg, off_peak_usg, mid_peak_usg, max_peak_usg, lead_pwr_factor, lag_pwr_factor, ess_chg_incen, ess_dischg_incen, demand_chg_reduct, energy_chg_reduct, ess_chg_off_peak, ess_chg_mid_peak, ess_chg_max_peak, ess_dischg_off_peak, ess_dischg_mid_peak, ess_dischg_max_peak, bdayIn_month, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_bill WHERE site_id = #{siteId} AND svc_sdate = #{svcSdate}

/* 요금 목록조회 */ SELECT bill_idx, site_id, bill_yearm, meter_read_day, plan_type, plan_name, contract_power, svc_sdate, svc_edate, base_rate, consume_rate, off_peak_rate, mid_peak_rate, max_peak_rate, pwr_factor_rate, tot_elec_rate, elec_fund, val_add_tax, tot_amt_bill, peak_pwr_demand, usg, off_peak_usg, mid_peak_usg, max_peak_usg, lead_pwr_factor, lag_pwr_factor, ess_chg_incen, ess_dischg_incen, demand_chg_reduct, energy_chg_reduct, ess_chg_off_peak, ess_chg_mid_peak, ess_chg_max_peak, ess_dischg_off_peak, ess_dischg_mid_peak, ess_dischg_max_peak, bdayIn_month, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_bill
WHERE LIMIT #{pageable.start}, #{pageable.end}
mapper.insert:
/* 요금(day) 등록 */ INSERT INTO tb_bill_day ( site_id, bill_yearm, meter_read_day, plan_type, plan_name, contract_power, svc_stimestamp, svc_etimestamp, base_rate, consume_rate, off_peak_rate, mid_peak_rate, max_peak_rate, pwr_factor_rate, tot_elec_rate, elec_fund, val_add_tax, tot_amt_bill, peak_pwr_demand, usg, off_peak_usg, mid_peak_usg, max_peak_usg, lead_pwr_factor, lag_pwr_factor, ess_chg_incen, ess_dischg_incen, demand_chg_reduct, energy_chg_reduct, ess_chg_off_peak, ess_chg_mid_peak, ess_chg_max_peak, ess_dischg_off_peak, ess_dischg_mid_peak, ess_dischg_max_peak, bdayIn_month, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{bill.siteId}, #{bill.billYearm}, #{bill.meterReadDay}, #{bill.planType}, #{bill.planName}, #{bill.contractPower}, #{bill.svcStimestamp}, #{bill.svcEtimestamp}, #{bill.baseRate}, #{bill.consumeRate}, #{bill.offPeakRate}, #{bill.midPeakRate}, #{bill.maxPeakRate}, #{bill.pwrFactorRate}, #{bill.totElecRate}, #{bill.elecFund}, #{bill.valAddTax}, #{bill.totAmtBill}, #{bill.peakPwrDemand}, #{bill.usg}, #{bill.offPeakUsg}, #{bill.midPeakUsg}, #{bill.maxPeakUsg}, #{bill.leadPwrFactor}, #{bill.lagPwrFactor}, #{bill.essChgIncen}, #{bill.essDischgIncen}, #{bill.demandChgReduct}, #{bill.energyChgReduct}, #{bill.essChgOffPeak}, #{bill.essChgMidPeak}, #{bill.essChgMaxPeak}, #{bill.essDischgOffPeak}, #{bill.essDischgMidPeak}, #{bill.essDischgMaxPeak}, #{bill.bdayInMonth}, now())
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.update:
/* 요금(day) 수정 */ UPDATE tb_bill_day
site_id = #{bill.siteId},
bill_yearm = #{bill.billYearm},
meter_read_day = #{bill.meterReadDay},
plan_type = #{bill.planType},
plan_name = #{bill.planName},
contract_power = #{bill.contractPower},
svc_stimestamp = #{bill.svcStimestamp},
svc_etimestamp = #{bill.svcEtimestamp},
base_rate = #{bill.baseRate},
consume_rate = #{bill.consumeRate},
off_peak_rate = #{bill.offPeakRate},
mid_peak_rate = #{bill.midPeakRate},
max_peak_rate = #{bill.maxPeakRate},
pwr_factor_rate = #{bill.pwrFactorRate},
tot_elec_rate = #{bill.totElecRate},
elec_fund = #{bill.elecFund},
val_add_tax = #{bill.valAddTax},
tot_amt_bill = #{bill.totAmtBill},
peak_pwr_demand = #{bill.peakPwrDemand},
usg = #{bill.usg},
off_peak_usg = #{bill.offPeakUsg},
mid_peak_usg = #{bill.midPeakUsg},
max_peak_usg = #{bill.maxPeakUsg},
lead_pwr_factor = #{bill.leadPwrFactor},
lag_pwr_factor = #{bill.lagPwrFactor},
ess_chg_incen = #{bill.essChgIncen},
ess_dischg_incen = #{bill.essDischgIncen},
demand_chg_reduct = #{bill.demandChgReduct},
energy_chg_reduct = #{bill.energyChgReduct},
ess_chg_off_peak = #{bill.essChgOffPeak},
ess_chg_mid_peak = #{bill.essChgMidPeak},
ess_chg_max_peak = #{bill.essChgMaxPeak},
ess_dischg_off_peak = #{bill.essDischgOffPeak},
ess_dischg_mid_peak = #{bill.essDischgMidPeak},
ess_dischg_max_peak = #{bill.essDischgMaxPeak},
bdayIn_month = #{bill.bdayInMonth},
mod_date = NOW()
WHERE bill_idx = #{bill.billIdx}
mapper.select: /* 요금(day) 상세조회 */ SELECT bill_idx, site_id, bill_yearm, meter_read_day, plan_type, plan_name, contract_power, svc_stimestamp, svc_etimestamp, base_rate, consume_rate, off_peak_rate, mid_peak_rate, max_peak_rate, pwr_factor_rate, tot_elec_rate, elec_fund, val_add_tax, tot_amt_bill, peak_pwr_demand, usg, off_peak_usg, mid_peak_usg, max_peak_usg, lead_pwr_factor, lag_pwr_factor, ess_chg_incen, ess_dischg_incen, demand_chg_reduct, energy_chg_reduct, ess_chg_off_peak, ess_chg_mid_peak, ess_chg_max_peak, ess_dischg_off_peak, ess_dischg_mid_peak, ess_dischg_max_peak, bdayIn_month, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_bill_day WHERE site_id = #{siteId} AND svc_stimestamp = #{svcStimestamp}
